summary: Validated the new /api/discover endpoint and DiscoveryFeed UI component. 6 new pytest tests for discover + 14 regression tests all pass (20/20). Playwright verified discovery grid (12 cards with #rank, ticker, signal badge, price/52w/RSI/score), in-watchlist badge on defaults (INFY.NS, TCS.NS), Watch button add flow (HCLTECH.NS flipped to In watchlist), card click opens stock-detail-dialog, include-weak toggle and discovery-refresh-button work. No regressions in existing watchlist/analyze/refresh/detail flows.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer still emits transient width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on mount before dialog layout settles; charts render correctly. Pre-existing from iteration_1.

critical_code_review_comments: server.discover: uses 'async for' inside a set comprehension for custom watchlist - works but consider to_list() for clarity; acceptable.
discover does NOT cap 'top' upper bound - a user passing top=10000 will still scan 40 tickers but return all; harmless since universe is fixed at 40, but consider min(top, len(MARKET_UNIVERSE)).

When top=12 and include_weak toggled on, card count may not increase because top caps results - minor UX observation (default already reaches the cap). Could expose universe_size or total_matching_before_cap so UI can show '12 of N'.
config.MARKET_UNIVERSE hard-codes 40 tickers; fine for MVP but consider loading from a collection in future for dynamic lists.
DiscoveryFeed re-fetches after add; good for keeping in_watchlist flag in sync with server.
seed_data_creation: Test added HCLTECH.NS to watchlist via Watch button, then removed via WatchlistManager. Pre-existing leftovers JINDALSAW.NS and HEG.NS observed in watchlist from earlier runs - not caused by this iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New endpoint: GET /api/discover?top=N&include_weak=bool — returns {generated_at, universe_size=40, strong_count, results:[{ticker, price, drawdown_percent, rsi, score, signal_strength, in_watchlist, is_default, ...}]}. Sorted by score desc. Default filter excludes Weak. First uncached call for 40 tickers can take 15-30s; subsequent calls use Mongo cache (45min TTL). New data-testids: section-discovery, discovery-grid, discovery-card-<TICKER>, add-to-watchlist-<TICKER>, in-watchlist-<TICKER>, include-weak-toggle, discovery-refresh-button. Default watchlist tickers (NIFTYBEES, BANKBEES, RELIANCE, TCS, INFY) correctly show in_watchlist=true. Existing endpoints remain unchanged and passing.
